name: slide-forge
description: Turn any document into a polished 1920×1080 presentation — video, PDF, or interactive HTML. 13 themes, 20+ content variants, fully automatic.
author: heytea

scripts.demo:html-local: rm -rf demo_html_out && mkdir -p demo_html_out && cp examples/scenes_example.json demo_html_out/scenes.json && echo '{"command":"step2","scenes":"./demo_html_out/scenes.json","output_dir":"./demo_html_out"}' | node executor.js && echo '{"command":"step3","scenes":"./demo_html_out/scenes.json","design_params":"./demo_html_out/design_params.json","output_dir":"./demo_html_out"}' | node executor.js && echo '{"command":"step4","html_dir":"./demo_html_out","output_dir":"./demo_html_out/screenshots","design_params":"./demo_html_out/design_params.json"}' | node executor.js && echo '{"command":"step6","scenes":"./demo_html_out/scenes.json","screenshots_dir":"./demo_html_out/screenshots","output_dir":"./demo_html_out","format":["html"]}' | node executor.js
scripts.clean: rm -rf output test_e2e test_step0 test_step1 test_full test_output test_project test_themes debug_html preview demo_html_out test_html_only
